case_title: J. C. LUKRICH & COMPANY, CPA VS TRI CITY DENTAL INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,368.34 FILED BY J. C. LUKRICH & COMPANY, CPA AS TO DEFENDANT TRI CITY DENTAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-14-1992, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM OCT-14-1992 TO OCT-28-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT TRI CITY DENTAL INC.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1992, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT TRI CITY DENTAL INC.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRI CITY DENTAL INC. HEARING SET FOR AUG-06-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF AUG-06-1993, GRANTED
BANKRUPTCY FILED BY TRI CITY DENTAL.
